summary.structural_fence: Double root of G1 never lifts on V(E) (R12 identity); Phi_x forces unique x off γ → fiber ∈ {0,1} on V(E). Size-2 ruled out structurally (conditional on anatomy annihilators).
summary.two_y_soft_upgrade: always at most one lifts because double never lifts

soft_lemma_two_y_at_most_one_lifts.statement: If G1 has two distinct roots a (multiple) and b (simple) on V(E), then a never lifts; at most b lifts once under forced x*.
